name: Burlington Stores, Inc.
description: Burlington Stores, Inc. is a nationally recognized off-price retailer operating retail stores across the United States. The company offers an extensive selection of in-season, fashion-focused merchandise, including ladies’ ready-to-wear apparel, menswear, youth apparel, footwear, accessories, home goods, and coats. Operating under the brand name Burlington, the retailer focuses on providing high-quality, brand-name merchandise at significant discounts compared to traditional department stores, utilizing a flexible and opportunistic purchasing model.
